name: boilerplate-core-en-v1
description: Seed eval set covering common factual Q&A patterns on synthetic company documentation.

documents.content:
# Invoicing Policy

Customers are billed monthly on the 1st of each month. Payment is due within 30 days of the invoice date.

## Late Fees

A 2% late fee applies to unpaid balances after 15 days past the due date. After 45 days, the account is suspended.

## Invoice Format

Invoices are sent via email as PDF attachments. Paper invoices are available on request for an additional $5 fee.

# Refund Policy

All purchases are eligible for a full refund within 14 days of the transaction date, provided the product has not been used.

## Exceptions

- Digital goods are non-refundable after download.
- Custom orders are non-refundable.
- Gift cards are final sale.

## Processing Time

Approved refunds are processed within 5 business days and returned to the original payment method.

# Shipping Policy

Standard shipping takes 3-5 business days within the continental United States. Express shipping takes 1-2 business days for an additional $15 charge.

## International

International orders ship via DHL and arrive within 7-14 business days. Customs duties are the recipient's responsibility.

## Free Shipping

Orders over $75 qualify for free standard shipping within the US.

# Security Policy

All data is encrypted at rest using AES-256 and in transit via TLS 1.3.

## Authentication

We require multi-factor authentication (MFA) for all administrative accounts. Session tokens expire after 60 minutes of inactivity.

## Incident Response

Security incidents are reported to security@example.com and investigated within 4 hours of receipt.

# Vacation Policy

Full-time employees receive 20 days of paid vacation per calendar year, accrued monthly.

## Rollover

Up to 5 unused vacation days can be rolled over to the next calendar year. Days beyond 5 are forfeited on January 1st.

## Requesting Time Off

Vacation requests must be submitted at least 2 weeks in advance through the HR portal.

# Support Tiers

## Basic

Email support with 48-hour response SLA. Included with all plans.

## Priority

Email + chat support with 4-hour response SLA. $99/month.

## Enterprise

24/7 phone support with 15-minute response SLA and a dedicated account manager. Custom pricing.

# API Rate Limits

The API enforces a default limit of 1,000 requests per hour per API key.

## Upgrades

Enterprise customers can request limits up to 100,000 requests per hour. Contact sales@example.com to upgrade.

## Rate-Limited Responses

Rate-limited requests return HTTP 429 with a Retry-After header indicating when the next request is allowed.

# Product Warranty

All hardware products include a 1-year limited warranty covering manufacturing defects.

## Extended Warranty

A 3-year extended warranty is available for 15% of the product price at time of purchase.

## Claims

Warranty claims require the original receipt and a description of the defect. Submit via the support portal.

questions.query: How long is the refund window?
How long does express shipping take?
What encryption does the platform use?
How long is a session valid?
How much vacation do I get?
Can I carry vacation days forward?
What is the SLA for Priority support?
Which support tier gives phone support?
What is the default API request rate?
How long is the standard product warranty?
What happens if my account is unpaid?
